messages.content: trả lời câu này 	What’s your best friend called?
As an AI language model, I do not have a best friend.
ví dụ bạn tốt nhất của tôi là kat
Great! "Kat" sounds like a nice name.
trả lời câu này như người	What will you do next weekend?
As an AI language model, I am a machine and do not have the capability to plan for weekends or perform activities. However, I am always here to assist you with any questions or tasks you may have!
Tôi nên trả lời câu này ntn What will you do next weekend?

Bạn có thể trả lời câu hỏi này bằng cách giới thiệu kế hoạch của mình cho cuối tuần tới. Ví dụ: "Tôi sẽ đi dã ngoại với gia đình hoặc tôi sẽ dành thời gian của mình cho việc đọc sách và xem phim hoặc tôi sẽ tham gia một sự kiện đặc biệt vào cuối tuần tới".
trả lời câu hỏi này bằng tiếng anh như thế nào How much chocolate do you buy every week?
To answer the question "How much chocolate do you buy every week?" in English, you can say something like: "I usually buy one or two bars of chocolate every week, depending on my mood and cravings."
trả lời câu hỏi này bằng tiếng anh như thế nào 14.	What’s your favourite film?

To answer the question "What's your favorite film?" in English, you can mention the name of your favorite movie, for example: "My favorite film is The Shawshank Redemption." or "I really enjoy watching the movie Inception, it's my favorite."
trả lời câu hỏi này bằng tiếng anh như thế nào 15.	How many T-shirts did you buy last summer?
To answer the question "How many T-shirts did you buy last summer?" in English, you can say something like: "I bought around 5 T-shirts last summer. They were all on sale, so I couldn't resist!"
trả lời câu hỏi này bằng tiếng anh như thế nào 17.	Do you prefer water or juice?

To answer the question "Do you prefer water or juice?" in English, you can share your preference by saying something like: "I prefer water as it is the healthiest drink, but I do enjoy a glass of juice occasionally as well."
19.	How much money do you spend on coffee per week? thì sao

To answer the question "How much money do you spend on coffee per week?" in English, you can share your approximate spending habits by saying something like: "I usually spend around $20 per week on coffee." or "I try to limit my coffee budget to $10 per week."
20.	When did you last brush your hair? THÍ SAO

To answer the question "When did you last brush your hair?" in English, you can mention the time or the period of the last time you brushed your hair such as: "I brushed my hair this morning before I left for work." or "I last brushed my hair about an hour ago."
23.	What do you have in your bedroom?

To answer the question "What do you have in your bedroom?" in English, you can mention the furniture and items you have in your bedroom such as: "In my bedroom, I have a bed, a dresser, a mirror, and a nightstand. I also have some decorations, a few books, and my laptop on my desk."
28.	How much time do you spend on the phone each day?

To answer the question "How much time do you spend on the phone each day?" in English, you can mention the average time you spend on your phone each day such as: "I spend around 2 hours per day on the phone, mostly for work and staying in touch with friends and family." or "I try to limit my phone usage to 1 hour per day to avoid distractions and maintain my productivity."
29.	Do you help to do the food shopping at home?

To answer the question "Do you help to do the food shopping at home?" in English, you can mention the extent of your involvement in food shopping at home such as: "Yes, I often accompany my parents to the grocery store and help them with the shopping list. Sometimes, I even take charge of picking up groceries online." or "Not very often, but occasionally I help out with food shopping when my family needs some extra help."
33.	What computer games do you play?

To answer the question "What computer games do you play?" in English, you can mention some of the computer games you enjoy playing such as: "I like to play first-person shooter games like Counter-Strike and Call of Duty, as well as strategy games like Age of Empires and Civilization." or "I enjoy playing simulation and role-playing games like The Sims and World of Warcraft, as well as puzzle games like Candy Crush and Sudoku."
35.	What are your favourite clothes?

To answer the question "What are your favourite clothes?" in English, you can mention the types of clothes you prefer to wear such as: "My favorite clothes are comfortable and casual ones like t-shirts, jeans, and sweatshirts." or "I also like to dress up in elegant dresses or suits for special occasions."
38.	Which is the most popular singer in your class?

To answer the question "Which is the most popular singer in your class?" in English, you can mention the name of the most popular singer as per your opinion or based on feedback from others such as: "As per my observation, Ariana Grande seems to be the most popular singer among my classmates." or "Many of my classmates are fans of Ed Sheeran and consider him to be the most popular singer."
39.	Where are you going to go to this summer holiday?

To answer the question "Where are you going to go for this summer holiday?" in English, you can mention the place or destination you plan to visit during your summer holiday such as: "I am planning to go to Hawaii where I can enjoy the beaches and sunny weather." or "I am considering going to Europe to visit some of the popular tourist destinations like Paris, London, and Rome."
i am going to go to halong this summer holiday có đúng ngữ pháp

"I am going to go to Halong this summer holiday" is understandable, but a better grammatical structure would be "I am going to Halong for my summer holidays" or "I am planning to visit Halong during my summer vacation".
39.	Where are you going to go to this summer holiday?

To answer the question "Where are you going to go for this summer holiday?" in English, you can mention the place or destination you plan to visit during your summer holiday such as: "I am planning to go to Hawaii where I can enjoy the beaches and sunny weather." or "I am considering going to Europe to visit some of the popular tourist destinations like Paris, London, and Rome."
41.	Which sports do you enjoy watching? Why?

To answer the question "Which sports do you enjoy watching? Why?" in English, you can mention the sports you like to watch and the reasons for your interest such as: "I enjoy watching soccer because it is a fast-paced game with lots of strategy involved. I also love the energy of the fans and the intensity of the matches." or "I like to watch basketball because of its athleticism and excitement. The skill and precision of the players always amaze me."
Tôi trả lời thế này có đc không I enjoy watching soccer because it is interesting

Yes, you could answer the question "Which sports do you enjoy watching? Why?" by saying "I enjoy watching soccer because it is interesting." However, it would be good to elaborate a little more on why you find soccer interesting. Are there any particular aspects of the game that you like, such as the strategy, the athleticism of the players or the excitement of the matches? Providing more information will make your answer more engaging and interesting.

42.	Do you do anything to keep fit or do you hate taking
exercise?

To answer the question "Do you do anything to keep fit or do you hate taking exercise?" in English, you can share your personal habit related to fitness and exercise such as: "Yes, I like to go for a jog or hit the gym a few times a week to keep myself fit. It makes me feel energized and helps me to stay healthy." or "No, I am not a big fan of exercise. I prefer to stay active in other ways like going for walks or doing housework."
43.	 Who do you get on well with in your family?

To answer the question "Who do you get on well with in your family?" in English, you can mention your family member with whom you have a good relationship such as: "I get along very well with my younger sister. We share similar interests and have a lot of fun together." or "I have a great bond with my parents. We often have long conversations about different aspects of life, and they are always there to support me when needed."
